title: crataegus oxyacantha f. macrocarpa
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha f. macrocarpa, also known as the Large-fruited Hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn tree (Crataegus oxyacantha) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a vasodilator, lower blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha f. macrocarpa include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving circulation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support heart health and promote overall well-being.
